title: taraxacum officinale subsp. pyrenaicum
intro: Taraxacum officinale subsp. pyrenaicum, also known as the Pyrenean dandelion, is a subspecies of the dandelion plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain bitter compounds, flavonoids, and terpenes. The health benefits of Taraxacum officinale subsp. pyrenaicum include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues and support overall well-being. Taraxacum officinale subsp. pyrenaicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to promote digestive health and vitality.
